top_signals.title: US Treasuries Rebound After Warsh’s Debut at Fed Stoked Selloff
top_signals.summary: US Treasuries recovered from a selloff after the new Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh positioned himself as a credible figure to fight inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Teradar pushes Summit sensor closer to serialization with new OEM deal
top_signals.summary:
Boston-based Teradar recently announced a paid technical evaluation program with a top German automaker for its terahertz vision technology. The milestone represents a key step forward for Teradar’s flagship Summit sensor. The sensor will be tested against edge cases that continue to expose the limitations of cameras, lidar and radar. These include detecting a fallen […]

The post Teradar pushes Summit sensor closer to serialization with new OEM deal appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: EU grants Ukraine access to cybersecurity reserve for major attacks
top_signals.summary: As Kyiv takes steps toward formal accession to the EU, the bloc is integrating Ukraine with its pool of pre-approved cybersecurity incident response companies.

top_signals.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - June 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of England to ‘tolerate slow return’ to inflation target as interest rates held
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England has said it will tolerate a delay in getting inflation back to its two per cent target as it held interest rates at 3.75 per cent in a split Monetary Policy Committee decision.  Bank officials said they were closely monitoring the outcome of a peace deal being struck between the US [...]

top_signals.title: Warner warns of CISA cuts, staffing gaps in letter to acting chief
top_signals.summary: Warner on Tuesday also wrote a letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin, underscoring that DHS must prioritize CISA and pay for the MS-ISAC.
